title: botrychium nipponicum
intro: Botrychium nipponicum, also known as Japanese grape fern, is a species of fern belonging to the family Ophioglossaceae. It is traditionally used in Eastern medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiviral, and antibacterial effects. The health benefits of Japanese grape fern include improving respiratory issues, reducing fever, and relieving pain, as well as having antioxidant and immunomodulatory properties. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, infusions, and decoctions, and is also dried and used as a powder for various health remedies.
